note: Internal sanity check only (build green + validation-matrix coverage) -- NOT verification. Per invariant I4, the implementer never verifies its own work; /cdr:verify is a separate dispatch.

checks.detail: The 2 failures (ingestion/test_shortlist.py::test_grpc_client_translates_request_response, test_grpc_client_is_a_valid_search_candidates_fn_for_shortlist) are a pre-existing protobuf Gencode/Runtime version mismatch (gencode 6.33.5 vs runtime 5.29.6) in the environment, unrelated to this change. Confirmed by `git stash -u` (removing this run's new file entirely) and re-running: identical 2 failures, 14 passed in ingestion/test_shortlist.py alone -- same failures exist on a clean checkout of ff4cbe9.

checks.result: 1 pre-existing finding (F401 unused `warnings` import in generated hivemind_pb2_grpc.py), unrelated to this change -- confirmed present identically via git stash before this file existed.
All 9 assertion-block entries (S1-topk-order .. S3-distinct-count-not-cap-limited) implemented as described in validation-matrix.json, each mapped to a concrete assertion in the 3 new test functions.
git status confirms only agents/query/test_topic_selector_integration.py is new; no existing file modified.

conclusion: Build green (apart from pre-existing, unrelated environment issues), matrix covered. Ready for handoff to /cdr:verify -- self-consistency does not constitute verification.
